title: OpenClaw Showcase
role: Official curated community examples and usage taxonomy
notes: CDP rendered extraction succeeded; visible text gave 1311 words and source links.

title: Browser (OpenClaw-managed)
role: Browser automation architecture, security controls, config, and CLI reference
notes: Documents isolated browser profile, existing-session profile, CDP, Chrome DevTools MCP, SSRF policy, Playwright dependency, refs, and troubleshooting.

title: openclaw browser CLI
role: Concrete browser CLI commands for profiles, tabs, snapshots, screenshots, navigation, click, and type
notes: Useful for reproducibility patterns and browser-control lessons.

title: OpenClaw CLI Automation
role: Non-interactive onboarding and agent setup commands
notes: Shows --non-interactive, provider flags, gateway port/bind, daemon install, and agent add automation.

title: openclaw/openclaw
role: Main OpenClaw repository and project self-description
notes: GitHub search captured the repo as the central project; used for project identity and ecosystem anchor.

title: openclaw/clawhub
role: Skill directory substrate for OpenClaw skills
notes: Used as evidence of a skill marketplace/directory pattern.

title: VoltAgent/awesome-openclaw-skills
role: Large categorized skill list from the OpenClaw skill ecosystem
notes: Strong breadth signal, weaker per-skill usage proof.

title: hesamsheikh/awesome-openclaw-usecases
role: Community collection of OpenClaw use cases
notes: Useful for use-case taxonomy; treated as curation not independent proof for every item.

title: AlexAnys/awesome-openclaw-usecases-zh
role: Chinese-language use-case catalog with office, content, DevOps, knowledge, and personal assistant scenarios
notes: Useful for non-English practitioner breadth; treated as medium-confidence curation.

title: AWS sample: host OpenClaw on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
role: Deployment-heavy sample with microVM isolation, Telegram/Slack routing, browser, guardrails, and CDK
notes: One of the strongest infrastructure and production-shape artifacts.

title: DingTalk OpenClaw Connector
role: Official DingTalk channel plugin for enterprise chat workflows
notes: Concrete channel connector with messaging, approvals-style work, attachments, and multi-agent routing signals.

title: Lark OpenClaw Connector
role: Lark/Feishu channel plugin
notes: Shows OpenClaw being adapted into workplace chat channels.

title: openclaw-wechat
role: Personal WeChat connection for OpenClaw
notes: Shows consumer messaging integration interest, especially in Chinese ecosystem.

title: padel-cli
role: Availability checking and booking CLI showcased for OpenClaw automation
notes: Concrete booking workflow adjacent to browser/API automation.

title: xuezh Chinese learning
role: Education and language-learning skill example
notes: Good education example with voice/pronunciation learning framing.

title: GoHome automation
role: Home automation system with OpenClaw as natural-language interface
notes: Concrete home/hardware automation evidence.

title: Karakeep semantic search
role: Knowledge and bookmark semantic search with Qdrant and embeddings
notes: Useful for memory/knowledge workflow pattern.

title: Clawdia bridge
role: Phone/voice bridge between Vapi and OpenClaw
notes: Voice interface example.

title: OpenClaw Home Assistant add-on
role: Home Assistant OS deployment add-on
notes: Deployment and home automation example.

title: Linear CLI
role: Developer productivity CLI integrated with agentic workflows including OpenClaw
notes: Concrete devtools workflow artifact.

title: Beeper CLI
role: Messaging automation via Beeper Desktop local MCP API
notes: Comparable all-chat automation pattern; useful for OpenClaw lesson.

title: SNAG screenshot-to-Markdown
role: Screenshot region to Markdown workflow for dev/productivity tasks
notes: Concrete data-extraction pattern from pixels to text.

title: nix-openclaw
role: Reproducible OpenClaw packaging and configuration through Nix
notes: Good evidence of reproducibility concerns.

title: openclaw-ansible
role: Automated hardened installation with Tailscale, UFW, and Docker isolation
notes: Good deployment and security hardening artifact.

title: OpenClaw-RL
role: Research-style project for training agents by talking
notes: Research/agent-training usage signal.

title: OpenClaw Medical Skills
role: Medical skill library for OpenClaw
notes: Domain-specific skill library; high safety caveat.

title: Apify OpenClaw plugin
role: Data extraction and actor-platform integration signal
notes: Comparable browser/data-extraction pattern where it sharpens OpenClaw lessons.

title: HN discussion mentioning OpenClaw and Claude Code policy controversy
role: Community sentiment and controversy signal
notes: Useful as sentiment and ecosystem risk signal, not as positive usage proof.

title: Reddit OpenClaw policy/workaround discussion
role: OpenClaw community support and workaround discussion
notes: Low extraction depth; used only as weak signal.

title: Stack Overflow: OpenClaw with WordPress workflow automation
role: Exploratory practitioner question about workflow automation
notes: API result only; shows curiosity, not deployment proof.

title: Stack Overflow: Boss wants us to add more AI to workflow
role: Adjacent agent workflow adoption concern in a Django/Docker/Celery stack
notes: Not OpenClaw-specific enough for strong evidence, but useful adjacent context.

title: OpenClaw setup walkthrough by VelvetShark
role: Official-showcase-linked setup walkthrough
notes: CDP extraction hit consent/bot-check warning; used through official showcase summary, not as independently extracted transcript.
